title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Ahmedabad

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Ahmedabad
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IIM Ahmedabad. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Varanasi-based team.

About IIM Ahmedabad:
IIM Ahmedabad is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Ahmedabad!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
